mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, u.user_name AS taskManager, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate, t.project_id AS projectId, t.task_manager AS taskManagerId FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.task_manager = u.user_code WHERE t.task_manager = #{userCode} AND t.finish_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 7 ORDER BY t.finish_date ASC

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, p.project_describe AS projectDescribe, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.finish_date AS finishDate, COUNT(t.task_id) AS totalTasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) AS completedTasks, CASE WHEN COUNT(t.task_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(t.task_id)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS taskProgress FROM project p INNER JOIN members m ON p.project_id = m.project_id LEFT JOIN task t ON p.project_id = t.project_id WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode} GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, p.project_describe AS projectDescribe, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.finish_date AS finishDate, COUNT(t.task_id) AS totalTasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) AS completedTasks, CASE WHEN COUNT(t.task_id) > 0 THEN ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 'e3' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(t.task_id)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS taskProgress FROM project p LEFT JOIN task t ON p.project_id = t.project_id GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.created_at, p.finish_date ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT th.history_id, th.task_id, t.project_id AS projectId, p.project_title AS projectTitle, u.user_name AS userName, NVL(d_title.new_value, t.task_title) AS taskTitle, NVL(d_type.new_value, tt.type_name) AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, th.action_type, /* 카멜케이스 별칭 제거 -> 팀원 원본 selectAll과 통일 */ th.action_at /* 카멜케이스 별칭 제거 -> 자동 매핑 활용 */ FROM task_history th INNER JOIN task t ON th.task_id = t.task_id INNER JOIN users u ON th.changed_by = u.user_code INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN task_history_detail d_title ON th.history_id = d_title.history_id AND d_title.field_name = 'task_title' LEFT JOIN task_history_detail d_type ON th.history_id = d_type.history_id AND d_type.field_name = 'type_name' LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id AND cc.common_code = '0E'
AND t.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND t.project_id IN
#{id}
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL AS history_id, w.wiki_page_id AS task_id, w.project_id AS projectId, p2.project_title AS projectTitle, u2.user_name AS userName, w.title AS taskTitle, '위키' AS typeName, '위키 생성' AS defaultDescribe, 'CREATE' AS action_type, w.created_at AS action_at /* 스네이크 케이스 유지 */ FROM wiki_pages w JOIN users u2 ON w.user_code = u2.user_code LEFT JOIN project p2 ON w.project_id = p2.project_id
AND w.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND w.project_id IN
#{id}
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL, wp.wiki_page_id, wp.project_id, p3.project_title, u3.user_name, h.title, '위키', '위키 수정', 'UPDATE', h.created_at FROM wiki_histories h JOIN wiki_pages wp ON h.wiki_page_id = wp.wiki_page_id JOIN users u3 ON h.user_code = u3.user_code LEFT JOIN project p3 ON wp.project_id = p3.project_id
AND wp.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND wp.project_id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY action_at DESC /* 정렬 기준을 스네이크 케이스로 변경 */ ) inner_q WHERE ROWNUM <= 20 ) WHERE rn > 0
